caption: A man wearing a white collared shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, and a tall, grey, textured wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and glasses. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a stand. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white shelving unit holding various items, including a "LEE" branded garment. Overlaid on the scene is a logo that reads "PODCAST" beneath a graphic and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" with smaller text below it that reads "LuvYourWoman". As the scene progresses, the man shifts his facial expression and head position slightly, moving from a skeptical look with a slight frown to a more neutral expression while speaking. He remains seated and centered in the frame throughout the sequence.
